seoTitle: Glen Ward vs Glen William — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Glen Ward vs Glen William: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Ward and Glen William.
heading: Glen Ward vs Glen William — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Ward, New South Wales and Glen William, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen William has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Glen Ward (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Ward or Glen William safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Ward has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Glen William scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Ward scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Glen William scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Ward or Glen William?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen William has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
